{{CargoClone
|name=Star Child
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=131
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} FTH +50
|gene3=Fire DMG +30
|gene4=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Troop Fire DMG +0.9%
|gene6=Per 60 Dragon Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Troop Fire DMG +1.5%
|}}
